royale 0.0.1
  • Reference

Package index

Clans

Access clan information

cr_get_clan()
Get a clan
cr_get_clan_members()
Get current clan members
cr_get_clan_search()
Search Clans
cr_get_riverrace_current()
Get current River Race
cr_get_riverrace_log()
Get River Race Log

Players

Access player information

cr_get_battle_log()
Get Battle Log
cr_get_player()
Get a single player
cr_get_upcoming_chests()
Get Upcoming Chests

Cards

Access card information

cr_get_cards()
Get card details

Tournaments

Access tournament information

cr_get_tournament()
Get Tournament
cr_get_tournament_search()
Search Tournaments

Locations

Access information for a location

cr_get_global_path_of_legend_players()
Get Global Player Path of Legend Rankings
cr_get_global_ranking_players()
Get Global Player Rankings for a Season
cr_get_global_ranking_tournament()
Get Global Tournament Rankings
cr_get_global_season()
Get Global Season
cr_get_global_seasons()
Get Global Seasons
cr_get_local_path_of_legend_players()
Get Player Path of Legend Rankings for a Location
cr_get_local_ranking_clans()
Get Clan Rankings for a Location
cr_get_local_ranking_players()
Get Player Rankings for a Location
cr_get_location()
Get One Location
cr_get_locations()
Get Locations
cr_get_seasons()
Get Global Seasons

Challenges

Access challenge information

cr_get_challenges()
Get Challenges

Global Tournaments

Access global tournament information

cr_get_global_tournaments()
Get Global Tournament details

Other functions

Other functions, including working with keys

cr_get_tournament()
Get Tournament
cr_get_tournament_search()
Search Tournaments
cr_set_key()
Set Clash Royale API key
cr_get_key() cr_has_key()
Get Clash Royale API key
